function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { has_no_descending_chain[T0](x0) != has_descending_chain[T0](x0) }[A](relation_pullback[A, B](f, r))

goal: exists(k0: Nat -> A) { is_descending_chain[A](relation_pullback[A, B](f, r), k0) }
proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { exists(k0: Nat -> T0) { is_descending_chain[T0](x0, k0) } = has_descending_chain[T0](x0) }[A](relation_pullback[A, B](f, r))
function(x0: Nat -> B) { not is_descending_chain[B](r, x0) }(descending_chain_map[A, B](f, c))
let w0: Nat -> B satisfy { is_descending_chain[B](r, w0) }
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { exists(k0: Nat -> T0) { is_descending_chain[T0](x0, k0) } = has_descending_chain[T0](x0) }[B](r)

goal: product_first_relation[A, B](r) = relation_pullback[Pair[A, B], A](first_projection, r)
proof: let w0: Pair[A, B] satisfy { product_first_relation[A, B](r, w0) != relation_pullback[Pair[A, B], A](first_projection, r, w0) }
Pair.first[A, B] = first_projection
let w1: Pair[A, B] satisfy { product_first_relation[A, B](r, w0, w1) != relation_pullback[Pair[A, B], A](first_projection, r, w0, w1) }
function[T0, T2](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: Pair[T0, T2], x2: Pair[T0, T2]) { x0(x1.first, x2.first) = product_first_relation[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[A, B](r, w0, w1)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x2: T0, x3: T0) { relation_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) = x1(x0(x2), x0(x3)) }[Pair[A, B], A](first_projection, r, w0, w1)

goal: product_second_relation[A, B](s) = relation_pullback[Pair[A, B], B](second_projection, s)
proof: let w0: Pair[A, B] satisfy { product_second_relation[A, B](s, w0) != relation_pullback[Pair[A, B], B](second_projection, s, w0) }
Pair.second[A, B] = second_projection
let w1: Pair[A, B] satisfy { product_second_relation[A, B](s, w0, w1) != relation_pullback[Pair[A, B], B](second_projection, s, w0, w1) }
function[T0, T2](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: Pair[T2, T0], x2: Pair[T2, T0]) { x0(x1.second, x2.second) = product_second_relation[T2, T0](x0, x1, x2) }[B, A](s, w0, w1)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x2: T0, x3: T0) { relation_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) = x1(x0(x2), x0(x3)) }[Pair[A, B], B](second_projection, s, w0, w1)
